tasks.label: Run platform API local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $script = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/control-plane-api/scripts/run_platform_api_local.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { throw 'apps/control-plane-api is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $repoRoot; & $script

tasks.label: Restart platform API local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $script = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/control-plane-api/scripts/run_platform_api_local.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { throw 'apps/control-plane-api is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $repoRoot; & $script -Restart

tasks.label: Forms engine smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/src'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; $env:PYTHONPATH='packages/forms-engine/src'; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m apex_forms_engine.smoke

tasks.label: Forms engine tests
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/tests'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; $env:PYTHONPATH='packages/forms-engine/src'; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m pytest packages/forms-engine/tests -q

tasks.label: Forms engine clean artifacts
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $artifacts = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/src/apex_forms_engine/artifacts'; if (-not (Test-Path $artifacts)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine artifacts are not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $artifacts '*') -Exclude '.gitignore' | Remove-Item -Force

tasks.label: Forms engine compile
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $src = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/src'; if (-not (Test-Path $src)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m compileall packages/forms-engine/src packages/forms-engine/tests

tasks.label: Run operations web local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' dev

tasks.label: Operations web typecheck
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' typecheck

tasks.label: Operations web browser smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' smoke:browser

tasks.label: Operations web promoted-host smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; $env:OPERATIONS_WEB_CONTROL_PLANE_BASE_URL='https://control.apexpowerops.com'; pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' smoke:promoted-host

tasks.label: Stage named platform paths
args: $raw = $env:APEX_PLATFORM_GIT_PATHSPEC; if (-not $raw) { throw 'Set APEX_PLATFORM_GIT_PATHSPEC to one or more semicolon-delimited paths under apex-power-ops-platform/ before running this task.' }; $paths = $raw -split ';' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ }; if (-not $paths) { throw 'APEX_PLATFORM_GIT_PATHSPEC did not contain any usable paths.' }; $invalid = $paths | Where-Object { $_ -notlike 'apex-power-ops-platform/*' }; if ($invalid) { throw ('All staged paths must stay under apex-power-ops-platform/. Invalid: ' + ($invalid -join ', ')) }; Set-Location 'C:/APEX Platform'; git add -- @paths

tasks.label: Preview parent-root Class A scaffold packet

Parent-root Class A scaffold packet staged diff
args: Set-Location 'C:/APEX Platform'; git diff --cached -- apex-power-ops-platform/.github apex-power-ops-platform/.gitignore apex-power-ops-platform/AGENTS.md apex-power-ops-platform/package.json apex-power-ops-platform/pnpm-lock.yaml apex-power-ops-platform/pnpm-workspace.yaml apex-power-ops-platform/pyproject.toml apex-power-ops-platform/apps/control-plane-api apex-power-ops-platform/apps/operations-web apex-power-ops-platform/apps/mutation-seam apex-power-ops-platform/packages/forms-engine apex-power-ops-platform/packages/calc-engine apex-power-ops-platform/tests/test_fixture_contract_020f.py

Run mutation seam local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/mutation-seam'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/mutation-seam is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $lane; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000

tasks.label: Mutation seam tests
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' '..')).Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/mutation-seam'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/mutation-seam is not present under the parent repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $lane; $env:SEAM_STORE_BACKEND='memory'; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m pytest tests/ -v
